sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107336" key="u(perbi/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερβίη</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107336.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">overbearing might, arrogance,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
